# Elfurat Spices

Elfurat Spices is a global exporter of premium Indian spices, aromatics, dry fruits, and pantry staples.

## Products

- [Indian Spices](https://elfuratspices.com/products/indian-spices): Cumin, Coriander, Turmeric, Red Chilli, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Cloves, Cinnamon.
- [Aromatics](https://elfuratspices.com/products/aromatics): Saffron, Vanilla.
- [Dry Fruits](https://elfuratspices.com/products/dry-fruits): Cashews, Almonds, Pistachios, Raisins.
- [Pantry Staples](https://elfuratspices.com/products/pantry-staples): Rice, Pulses, Sugar, Salt.
